programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: With the contestants narrowed down to 32, Don Mann and Randy Couture reveal a new twist that changes the game: a complex point system that turns survival into a strategic battle. Contestants face grueling military training and a brutal 5K run through Nevada’s desert, testing their endurance and mental toughness. As mentors and adversaries, Don and Randy push the contestants to their limits. This episode marks the beginning of an intense journey where only the strongest and most strategic will prevail.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: For the first time in Surviving Mann history, the contestants undergo intense combat training led by none other than Ken Shamrock—"the most dangerous man in the world." His relentless situation drills push this elite group beyond their limits, sharpening their instincts and forging next-level tactical readiness. As a new mission begins to take shape, the pressure mounts—and the team learns that the strongest among them will earn a game-changing reward. But in a world where every edge matters, not everyone is built to keep up. Fatigue sets in, tensions rise, and the difference between teammate and competitor begins to blur. With Shamrock watching closely, only the most disciplined will rise to meet the challenge—and prove they’re worthy of what lies ahead.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: Back by unpopular demand, the infamous “Blah Line” returns—and it’s more brutal than ever. The contestants kick off the day with a hellish PT session that leaves bodies broken and spirits tested. Things only get rougher from there with a punishing stealth crawl over jagged rocks, grinding them down before they face Ken Shamrock’s infamous Lion’s Den training—a relentless gauntlet of pain, grit, and raw endurance. As Don Mann continues to forge a battle-ready team, the squad is thrown into breaching drills designed for high-stakes mission execution. It’s chaos, it’s calculated, and it separates the contenders from the pretenders. In the heat of the action, two standouts emerge from the ranks—earning the coveted role of designated breachers.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: In the Season 2 premiere of Surviving Mann you'll meet The Black Team and The Blue Team—12 tough-as-nails contestants who will take on everything Don could throw at them even after seeing Season 1! Co-host Sheriff Mark Lamb jumps in to bring advanced law enforcement training tactics & strategies to the evolution line-up.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: Episode 2 is star-studded and action-packed! Get ready for amazing celebrity guests; and you know Don and Sheriff Lamb won't be giving the contestants a break. The challenges keep coming as SAR USA brings in a former FBI agent & trainer to put our contestants through an adrenaline-pumping exercise. Will all the contestants make it through the day? Watch now to find out!

programme.title: Buffalo Bill, Jr S1E26 Fugitive from Injustice.
programme.desc: Young Papito Gonzales is on the run from a man who claims that the mare and colt the boy has are his. Papito soon comes to Wileyville while on the run and gets into trouble with some men who steal his mare. Bill and Calamity set out to help the boy reclaim his horses and clear a matter with the man who is looking for him

programme.title: The Brothers O'Toole 1973
programme.desc: In The Brothers O’Toole, Tim Conway and John Astin star in a rollicking Western comedy of mistaken identity and small-town chaos. When two lookalike drifters stumble into a struggling frontier town, one is hailed as a hero while the other is branded an outlaw. Their misadventures set off a whirlwind of mix-ups, scams, and slapstick mayhem. With sharp wit, lively performances, and a playful twist on Western tradition, this offbeat comedy delivers laughs as big as the open range.

programme.title: Forbidden Trails 1941
programme.desc: The Rough Riders ride again in Forbidden Trails! When Marshal Buck Roberts (Buck Jones) is gunned down and badly wounded, he refuses to quit the fight. With fellow lawmen Tim McCoy and Raymond Hatton at his side, the trio saddles up to take on a ruthless gang terrorizing the frontier. Packed with blazing six-gun action, camaraderie, and justice served Western-style, this thrilling chapter in the Rough Riders series delivers nonstop excitement.

programme.title: Code of the Fearless 1939
programme.desc: In Code of the Fearless, cowboy hero Fred Scott sings and rides into action as a Texas Ranger framed for crimes he didn’t commit. Determined to clear his name, he battles a ruthless gang of land-grabbers while standing tall for truth and justice. With stirring songs, fast-paced gunfights, and Scott’s trademark charm, this Western adventure celebrates the courage of those who live—and fight—by an unbreakable code.

programme.title: Raiders of Old California
programme.desc: At the end of the Mexican-American War, a crooked U.S. Cavalry Captain and his men force a captive Mexican officer to sign the deeds to his vast lands and large hacienda over to the Captain

programme.title: North of Arizona
programme.desc: Perrin is a cowboy who comes to the aid of local Indians being swindled out of their gold. He signs on as a ranch foreman, but learns the ranch is the home of the crooks.

programme.title: On The Job: Brendan Dusts off Orlando Legends
